Package aura.core

Class Transition

java.lang.Object
aura.core.Transition
Direct Known Subclasses:
AnimateBackground, AnimateColor, AnimateFloat, AnimateGap, AnimateInteger, AnimateOpacity, AnimatePoint, AnimateRipple, AnimateRotation, AnimateScale, AnimateShadow, AnimateShake, AnimateWobble
public abstract class Transition extends Object
